name: Heimdall MCP Server
what_it_does: Heimdall MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Heimdall Application Dashboard — the self-hosted application bookmark and monitoring dashboard — querying configured application links, checking application status, and integrating Heimdall's centralized app launcher into agent-driven homelab and self-hosted infrastructure workflows.
use_cases: Querying configured application URLs from homelab management agents
Checking self-hosted application availability from monitoring agents
Managing application bookmarks from organization agents
Building contextual app launchers from assistant agents
Discovering available self-hosted services from inventory agents
Integrating with homelab dashboards from automation agents
not_for: Production application monitoring (use Prometheus/Datadog for that)
Teams using Homer, Dashy, or other dashboard alternatives
best_when: A homelab enthusiast uses Heimdall as their application dashboard and wants AI agents to know about available services — useful for AI home assistants that need to discover and link to self-hosted apps.
avoid_when: You use Homer, Dashy, or another dashboard, or need proper application monitoring rather than link management.

auth.notes: Heimdall API key required. Generate from Heimdall settings. Self-hosted Heimdall instance URL must be configured.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Heimdall is completely free and open source
pricing.notes: Heimdall is free open source. Community MCP is free. Self-hosting costs apply.

performance.rate_limits: Local Heimdall instance — no rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: Very niche use case — only valuable for Heimdall dashboard users
Community MCP from individual contributor — minimal maintenance
Heimdall API is undocumented/unofficial — may break with updates
Limited tool set — primarily application link discovery
Community project with small user base
Heimdall itself is focused on link management, not monitoring
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local Heimdall instance. API key access. Community MCP. Self-hosted data stays local.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local Heimdall. API key. Community MCP. Data stays local.
